apply: Students will be able to apply the literary devices used in 'Father to Son' to their own writing.
Students will be able to use the themes and messages from 'Father to Son' to understand and relate to real-life situations.
Students will be able to create a character sketch of the speaker in 'Father to Son' based on the poet's description.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the contrast between the poet's generation and the younger generation in 'Father to Son'.
Students will be able to evaluate the poet's use of language and form in 'Father to Son' to convey the message.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the themes of 'Father to Son' with other poems by Rabindranath Tagore.
remember: Students will be able to recall the central message and themes of the poem 'Father to Son' by Rabindranath Tagore.
Students will be able to list and explain the literary devices used in the poem 'Father to Son'.
Students will be able to identify and describe the characters in the poem 'Father to Son'.
understand: Students will be able to analyze the poet's perspective on life, love, and relationships through 'Father to Son'.
Students will be able to understand the poet's use of symbolism and imagery in 'Father to Son'.
Students will be able to explain the poet's message on the importance of following one's dreams in 'Father to Son'.

ncert_objectives: To understand the central message and themes of the poem 'Father to Son'.
To analyze the poet's use of literary devices and symbolism in 'Father to Son'.
To identify and describe the characters in the poem 'Father to Son'.
board_exam_objectives: To understand the central message and themes of the poem 'Father to Son' as a part of the CBSE Class 11 English board exam.
To analyze the poet's use of literary devices and symbolism in 'Father to Son' for the CBSE Class 11 English board exam.
To identify and describe the characters in the poem 'Father to Son' for the CBSE Class 11 English board exam.
